findings.title: Session state persists between test runs
findings.what: student4 has an existing in-progress session from a previous run — clicking Resume Test
findings.expected: This is expected behavior — the simulation is resuming a real student session state

findings.title: JavaScript error: code.startsWith is not a function
findings.what: Page error: "code.startsWith is not a function" fires when submitting MCQ section (2 occurrences in v4 run)
findings.expected: No JavaScript errors during test submission flow
findings.evidence: Captured twice in consoleErrors during /ap/test/test_micro_full_1 submit flow

findings.title: FRQ submission not reached after 10 navigation iterations
findings.what: FRQ section has 7 navigation items. After 10 loop iterations (completing items Q11 of 7), Submit Test button was never found enabled. The script exhausted its iteration budget.
findings.expected: After completing all FRQ sub-questions, Submit Test button should appear enabled
findings.evidence: Screenshots v5_03_frq_q*.png — last FRQ item reached: Q11 of 7. FRQ Review → button: visible but cycling through sub-questions did not produce Submit Test.

findings.title: Report card page not reached after FRQ completion attempt
findings.what: After FRQ navigation iterations (submitReached=false), URL is http://localhost:5173/ap/test/test_micro_full_1. Expected /ap/results/:id. Page text:
findings.expected: After Submit Test, app should navigate to /ap/results/:resultId showing the complete report card

consoleErrors.msg:
[2026-03-10T10:23:16.191Z]  @firebase/firestore: Firestore (12.6.0): Could not reach Cloud Firestore backend. Connection failed 1 times. Most recent error: FirebaseError: [code=unavailable]: The operation could not be completed
This typically indicates that your device does not have a healthy Internet connection at the moment. The client will operate in offline mode until it is able to successfully connect to the backend.

simulationNotes: Test page state: instruction=true, inTest=false, frq=false, completed=false
Session resume detected — student4 has existing IN_PROGRESS session from previous run
